mapper.sql: A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SIPMS_SVC_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_HGROUP_CD , A.SSVC_MGROUP_CD, A.SSVC_LGROUP_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SUSE_TYPE_CD, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD B ON A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = B.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD

SELECT NRESULT FROM ( SELECT BIF.UF_WS_GET_IP_LIST( #{ssvcLineTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icisofficescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipmsSvcSeq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{assignTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipVersionTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipCreateTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipbitmask,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) AS NRESULT)

SELECT NRESULT FROM( SELECT BIF.UF_WS_INSERTRESERVEDIPLIST( #{sordernum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regyn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{said,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{llnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icisofficescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_version_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_create_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nip_assign_mst_seq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{ip_block,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipbitmask,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sipaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eipaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipms_svc_seq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{assign_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ex_svc_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svc_use_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gatewayip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_msg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sofficecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slacpblockyn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '' ) AS NRESULT)

SELECT NRESULT FROM( SELECT BIF.UF_WS_INSERTFIXIPLIST( #{sordernum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regyn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{said,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{llnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icisofficescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_version_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_create_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nip_assign_mst_seq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{ip_block,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipbitmask,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipms_svc_seq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{assign_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ex_svc_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svc_use_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gatewayip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_msg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{odr_close_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lacpsaid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscnescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscmstip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subsclgipportseq,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subsclgipportdescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subsclgipportip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscrouterserialip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscnealias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{connalias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{report_opinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installroadaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workerid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{odrregdt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{odrhopedt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sspeeddesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sofficecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slacpblockyn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '' ) AS NRESULT)

SELECT NRESULT FROM( SELECT BIF.UF_WS_INSERTRESERVEDVPNIPLIST( #{regyn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{said,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{llnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icisofficescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_version_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_create_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_block,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipbitmask,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipms_svc_seq, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{assign_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ex_svc_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svc_use_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_msg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sofficecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ssvclinetypecd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workerid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{report_opinion,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS NRESULT)

SELECT NRESULT FROM( SELECT BIF.UF_WS_INSERTFIXVPNIPLIST( #{regyn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{said, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{llnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icisofficescode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_version_type_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_create_type_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip_block, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipbitmask, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eipaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipms_svc_seq, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler}, #{assign_type_cd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ex_svc_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svc_use_type_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sresult_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscnescode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscmstip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subsclgipportseq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subsclgipportdescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subsclgipportip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscrouterserialip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subscnealias, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{report_opinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installaddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installroadaddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workerid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sofficecode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ssvclinetypecd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS NRESULT)

SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ ,A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ,A.SEX_SVC_CD ,A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_BLOCK ,A.NBITMASK ,A.SFIRST_ADDR ,A.SLAST_ADDR ,B.SGATEWAYIP ,B.SLACPSID ,B.SSAID ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ,A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B on A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND B.SSAID = #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ ,A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ,A.SEX_SVC_CD ,A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_BLOCK ,A.NBITMASK ,A.SFIRST_ADDR ,A.SLAST_ADDR ,B.SGATEWAYIP ,B.SLACPSID ,B.SSAID ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ,A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B on A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND B.SSAID = (SELECT distinct B.SLACPSID FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B on A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLACPSID = #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT M.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, M.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, M.SEX_SVC_CD, M.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD, M.SUSE_TYPE_CD, S.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD FROM MST.V_TB_LVL_SVC_MST M , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_SUB S ,mst.tb_ipms_svc_mst c WHERE M.SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD = 'CE0001' AND M.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = S.NIPMS_SVC_MST_SEQ AND M.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = C.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ AND (DATE(S.DMODIFY_DT) =(TO_DATE(#{currentDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})-1) OR DATE(C.DMODIFY_DT) =(TO_DATE(#{currentDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR})-1)) order by nipms_svc_seq

SELECT A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK , A.DMODIFY_DT , DETAIL_RSLT FROM ( SELECT A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK , (CASE WHEN A.DMODIFY_DT = A.DCREATE_DT THEN NULL WHEN A.DMODIFY_DT != A.DCREATE_DT THEN A.DMODIFY_DT ELSE NULL END) AS DMODIFY_DT , mst.fn_summary_suggest_ip_list_sdn(A.nip_assign_mst_seq) AS DETAIL_RSLT FROM MST.tb_ip_assign_mst A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST B ON B.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ WHERE A.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0004'
AND A.sip_block like #{sipAddressSearchKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
AND A.ssvc_line_type_cd = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.sassign_type_cd = #{assignTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.sip_version_type_cd = #{ipVersionTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.sip_create_type_cd = #{ipCreateTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}
AND A.nbitmask = #{ipbitmask, jdbcType=INTEGER} -- MAX 64
AND A.nlvl_mst_seq IN (SELECT DISTINCT nlvl_mst_seq FROM MST.TB_lvl_mst WHERE ssvc_line_type_cd = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND ssvc_obj_cd IN ( SELECT slvl_cd FROM MST.TB_Lvl_SUB_CD WHERE sLOFFICECODE = #{icisofficescode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ssvc_line_type_cd = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} )) ) A

SELECT A.SSAID , A.SREGYN , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.SGATEWAYIP , B.SLACPBLOCKYN , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SORDERNUM , C.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A LEFT JOIN BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST B ON B.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ = A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST C ON C.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.SSAID = #{said,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.SSAID , A.SREGYN , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.SGATEWAYIP , B.SLACPBLOCKYN , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , C.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , B.SORDERNUM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A LEFT JOIN BIF.TB_IP_ALLOC_NEOSS_MST B ON B.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ = A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST C ON C.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.SSAID = #{said,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ ,A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ,A.SEX_SVC_CD ,A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD ,A.SIP_BLOCK ,A.NBITMASK ,A.SFIRST_ADDR ,A.SLAST_ADDR ,B.SGATEWAYIP ,B.SLACPSID ,B.SSAID ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ,A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,B.SICISOFFICESCODE ,B.SSUBSCNEALIAS FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ WHERE B.SSAID = #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT DETAIL_RSLT FROM mst.fn_summary_routing_result(#{nipAssignMstSeq,jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.BigIntTypeHandler})
